title: The Mysteries of a Parent's Love

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I wonder how much running I can do once I get off the train 
and get home. Either way, I have to run twice as much as 
usual tomorrow…

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hold it right there!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sweep?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: …Scarlet, come with me!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What? Why?! I told you I was going home—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Just shut up and come!! Follow me!!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What? Geez, what does she want now…?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Stay there! I'm going to cast one of my greatest spells on you!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: A spell? Wait a sec—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Brassavola ☆ nodosa! ☆ Paphiopedilum ☆ delenatii!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Uh… Nothing's happening.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! I-I just messed up a little, that's all! 
As a favor, I'll cast it on you one more time!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Brassavola ☆ nodosa! ☆ Paphiopedilum ☆ delenatii!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: …Brassavola ☆ nodosa! ☆ Paphiopedilum ☆ delenatii!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah! Why, why, why isn't it working?! Why aren't any red roses appearing?! And why won't any white pigeons come out?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: …Red roses? White pigeons?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
This spell is really amazing! No matter how sad you are, 
it turns your frown upside down the moment you see it!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Grandma showed it to me so many times… Hic! It really is super amazing! Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: …Were you trying to comfort me?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: No! I was trying to cast a spell on you because you looked sad!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Magic, huh? Hehe… Thank you. 
I really appreciate you doing that for me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: …I'm sure your grandmother loves you very much.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Sniff… What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
She used sleight— er, real magic to cheer you up, right? 
Her love for you allowed her to do that.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Really…?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Really. You can only cheer someone up when you give them 
enough attention to notice that they're upset to begin with.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It's like with my mom. She used to take me 
to the amusement park or out shopping when 
I was feeling down. I'm sure it's because she…

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: …was always looking after me…

"I hope you like the swimsuit I got you. You've been so 
busy lately. Take some time to visit the beach or pool 
once in a while, dear. Love, Mama."

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: …Oh.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: …Scarlet?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Was that why… she sent me the letter? 
Not because I did poorly in the practice race…

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
…but because she cared about me… and saw 
that I needed a break? Is that… Is that really it?
Daiwa Scarlet freezes for a moment and clutches her head.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh…

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Of course that was it. There's no way that Mama 
would've been that mean… Normally, I would've 
realized her intent right away, and yet…

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What are you mumbling about? Tell me!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Nothing. I'm just realizing how out of sorts I've been…

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huh? What'd you say? I couldn't hear you!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: …If that's my problem, then…

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Maybe what I need right now… is to have some fun.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: …Right. Let's go, Sweep. Thank you for casting that spell on me.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, what is going on?! 
Wait… Do you mean my magic worked?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe… Well done, Sweep Pea♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? So you're not going home?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Nope. Sorry for being so indecisive.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
No worries! I have nooo idea what happened to change 
your mind, but— oh, where's Tickezo?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Heeey! Everyone!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Eeek!?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh, Scarlet! You came back! Nice timing!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Since this is Maruzen's hundredth visit here, 
they said we can have exclusive use of the entire 
light-up pool tonight as a special treat!

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: We can?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah! I'd completely forgotten about that!
